title: Applets catalogue
description: Inventory of the old interactive applets/games, grouped by category, each with a porting status.

category_notes.description: Optional note rendered under a category heading, keyed by category name.

philosophy.description: Generic 'Design philosophy' principles rendered as a section at the foot of the page (id=design-philosophy). Bodies support inline *emphasis* and [label](url) links.

category.description: Grouping heading; sections render in first-seen order.

year.description: Year the original source was last modified.

status.description: ported = modern version on this site; live = already works elsewhere; to-port = broken Java, portable; retired = superseded/not planned; original = first published on this site; in-development = original app first published here but still an actively-developed work in progress (pre-alpha).

date.description: Publication date (ISO, e.g. 2026-07-11) for apps first published on this site.

url.description: Working version (local ported page or live external app).

source.description: Original page (usually a dead Java applet).

writeup.description: Optional link to a longer write-up / making-of page for this app.
